defaultProgram:
search filter, synth

perlin(scale: 75, octaves: 2)
.adjust(mode: hsv, rotation: 120, hueRange: 40)
.write(o0)

search synth, filter
testPattern(gridSize: 8)
.bulge()
.write(o0)

search filter, synth

noise(octaves: 4, scaleX: 100, scaleY: 100, ridges: true)
  .celShading()
  .write(o0)

search synth, filter
noise(colorMode: mono, ridges: true)
.chromaticAberration()
.write(o0)

search filter, synth

solid(color: #2d78f0)
.clouds(scale: 0.55)
.write(o0)

search filter, synth

noise(ridges: true, colorMode: mono)
.colorReplace(targetColor: #000000, replaceColor: #ff0000, sensitivity: 0.4, smoothing: 0.2)
.write(o0)

search filter, synth

noise(ridges: true)
.colorspace(mode: oklab)
.write(o0)

search filter, synth

testPattern()
.degauss()
.write(o0)

search filter, synth

solid(color: #000000)
.fibers(density: 1)
.write(o0)

search filter, synth

solid(color: #ffffff)
 .grime(strength: 1)
.write(o0)

search filter, synth

noise(ridges: true, colorMode: mono)
.historicPalette()
.write(o0)

search filter, synth

testPattern(gridSize: 8)
.lens(displacement: 0.5)
.write(o0)

search filter, synth

noise(ridges: true)
.lighting(normalStrength: 2)
.write(o0)

search filter, synth

noise(ridges: true)
.parallax()
.write(o0)

search filter, synth

noise(ridges: true, colorMode: mono)
.prismaticAberration(modulate: true)

search filter, synth

solid(color: #2b2b2b)

.write(o0)

search filter, synth

testPattern()
.scroll(speedX: 1, speedY: 1)
.write(o0)

search filter, synth

pattern(type: dots, smoothness: 0.04)

search filter, synth

noise(ridges: true, colorMode: mono)
.simpleAberration()
.write(o0)

search filter, synth

testPattern()
.skew(wrap: repeat)
.write(o0)

search filter, synth

modPattern()
.smooth(type: blur, radius: 4)
.write(o0)

search synth, filter

cell()
  .smoothstep(edge1: 0.51)
  .write(o0)

search filter, synth

solid(color: #d4d4d4)
  .spatter(density: 1)
  .write(o0)

search filter, synth

perlin()
  .spookyTicker()
  .write(o0)

search filter, synth

perlin(scale: 100)
  .strayHair()
  .write(o0)

search filter, synth

noise(
  speed: 40,
  colorMode: mono,
  ridges: true
)
  .temporalAberration()
  .write(o0)

search filter, synth

noise()
  .tetraColorArray(smoothness: 0)
  .write(o0)

search filter, synth

noise()
  .tetraCosine()
  .write(o0)

search filter, synth

perlin(scale: 100)
  .text()
  .write(o0)

search filter, synth

solid(color: #d1d1d1)
  .texture(alpha: 0.75)
  .write(o0)

search filter, synth

noise(ridges: true, colorMode: mono)
.tint(color: #ff0000, alpha: 0.5, mode: overlay)
.write(o0)

search filter, synth

testPattern()
  .translate(x: 0.05, y: -0.05)
  .write(o0)

search mixer, synth

polygon(smooth: 0, bgAlpha: 0)
  .write(o0)

 noise(scaleX: 100, scaleY: 100)
  .alphaMask(tex: read(o0))
  .write(o1)

search mixer, synth

noise(seed: 1, ridges: true)
.write(o0)

perlin()
.applyMode(tex: read(o0))
.write(o1)

search mixer, synth

noise(ridges: true, colorMode: mono)
.write(o0)

perlin()
.blendMode(tex: read(o0), mode: phoenix)
.write(o1)

search mixer, synth

solid(color: #000000)
.write(o0)

noise()
.cellSplit(invert: sourceB)
.write(o1)

search mixer, synth

noise(ridges: true, colorMode: mono)
.write(o0)

noise(ridges: true)
.centerMask(tex: read(o0), mix: -75)
.write(o1)

search mixer, synth, filter

noise(ridges: true, colorMode: mono)
.write(o0)

perlin(colorMode: mono)
.write(o1)

gradient(type: linear)
.write(o2)

channelCombine(rTex: read(o0), gTex: read(o1), bTex: read(o2))
.write(o3)

search mixer, synth

cell()
.write(o0)

noise(ridges: true)
.distortion(tex: read(o0))
.write(o1)

search mixer, synth

noise(
  type: constant,
  octaves: 4,
  ridges: true,
  loopScale: 100,
  speed: 100
)
  .write(o0)

solid(color: #006d4c)
  .write(o1)

perlin(ridges: true)
  .write(o2)

gradient(
  type: noiseGradient,
  color1: #ffffffff,
  color2: #a9a9a9ff,
  color3: #515151ff,
  color4: #000000ff,
  colorCount: 3
)
  .write(o3)

mashup(
  source: read(o3),
  layers: 3,
  smoothness: 0.22,
  layer0_tex: read(o0),
  layer1_tex: read(o1),
  layer2_tex: read(o2)
)
  .write(o4)

search mixer, synth

noise(ridges: true, colorMode: mono)
.write(o0)

noise(ridges: true)
.patternMix(tex: read(o0))
.write(o1)

search mixer, synth

noise(scaleX: 100, scaleY: 100)
.write(o0)

noise(ridges: true, colorMode: mono)
.shadow(tex: read(o0))
.write(o1)

search mixer, synth

noise(ridges: true, colorMode: mono)
.write(o0)

noise(ridges: true)
.shapeMask(tex: read(o0))
.write(o1)

search mixer, synth

noise(ridges: true, colorMode: mono)
.write(o0)

noise(seed: 2, ridges: true)
.split(tex: read(o0), softness: 1)
.write(o1)

search mixer, synth

noise()
.write(o0)

solid(color: #000000)
.thresholdMix(tex: read(o0))
.write(o1)

search mixer, synth

pattern()
.write(o0)

noise(ridges: true)
.uvRemap(tex: read(o0), scale: 25)
.write(o1)

search points, synth, render

perlin()
  .pointsEmit(stateSize: 512)
  .buddhabrot()
  .pointsRender(intensity: 99)
  .write(o0)

render(o0)

search render

meshLoader()
.meshRender()
.write(o0)

search synth3d, filter3d, render

noise3d()
.renderLit3d(specularIntensity: 2, shininess: 256)
.write(o0)

search synth

noise(
  type: hermite,
  ridges: true,
  speed: 30,
  colorMode: mono
)
  .write(o0)

navierStokes(
  tex: read(o0),
  dyeDecay: 98,
  inputForce: 0.5,
  inputIntensity: 10
)
  .write(o1)

render(o1)

search synth

remap(bgColor: #336699, bgAlpha: 1)
  .write(o0)

search synth3d, filter3d, render

cellularAutomata3d(ruleIndex: diamoeba)
.render3d()
.write(o0)

search synth3d, filter3d, render

shape3d(speedA: -2, speedB: 2)
.render3d(threshold: 0.75)
.write(o0)
